scripts.build: npm run check:tracking && vite build --mode development
scripts.build:prod: npm run check:tracking && vite build --mode production --outDir dist-prod
scripts.zip: npm run build:prod && cd dist-prod && zip -r ../super-ltc-extension.zip . && cd .. && echo 'Created super-ltc-extension.zip'
scripts.build:store: npm run check:tracking && POSTHOG_KEY=phc_PLACEHOLDER vite build --mode store
scripts.zip:store: npm run build:store && rm -f super-ltc-store.zip && cd dist-store && zip -r ../super-ltc-store.zip . -x 'update-super-ltc*' 'install-auto-updater.bat' 'uninstall-auto-updater.bat' && cd .. && echo 'Created super-ltc-store.zip (Chrome Web Store ready)'
scripts.demo:deploy: npm run demo:build && DEMO_ENTRY=legacy npm run demo:build && rm -rf demo-dist && mkdir -p demo-dist/content/css demo-dist/content/icd10-viewer demo-dist/content/super-menu demo-dist/lib && rsync -a --exclude='*.jsx' --exclude='components/' --exclude='hooks/' --exclude='pcc-demo.html' --exclude='demo-mock-chrome.js' --exclude='demo-mock-globals.js' demo/ demo-dist/demo/ && cp content/css/variables.css content/css/icd10-viewer.css content/css/therapy-modal.css content/css/meddiag-augment.css content/css/pdpm-analyzer.css demo-dist/content/css/ && cp content/icd10-viewer/icd10-mock-data.js content/icd10-viewer/icd10-api.js content/icd10-viewer/icd10-sidebar.js content/icd10-viewer/icd10-evidence-panel.js content/icd10-viewer/icd10-pdf-viewer.js content/icd10-viewer/icd10-viewer.js demo-dist/content/icd10-viewer/ && cp content/super-menu/meddiag-augment.js demo-dist/content/super-menu/ && cp lib/pdf.min.js lib/pdf.worker.min.js demo-dist/lib/ 2>/dev/null; echo '<html><head><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=demo/mds-section-i.html"></head></html>' > demo-dist/index.html && echo 'Ready! Drag demo-dist/ into Netlify'
